DIBAL-H.name: diisobutylaluminium hydride
DIBAL-H.common_use: Reduces esters and nitriles to aldehydes when used at low temperature (one equivalent).

OsO4.name: osmium tetroxide
OsO4.common_use: Adds two OH groups syn across an alkene to give a cis-diol.

O3.name: ozone
O3.common_use: Ozonolysis cleaves alkenes into carbonyl compounds (workup determines aldehyde vs acid).

TsCl.name: para-toluenesulfonyl chloride
TsCl.common_use: Converts alcohols into tosylates, turning a poor leaving group into a good one.

SOCl2.name: thionyl chloride
SOCl2.common_use: Converts carboxylic acids to acyl chlorides and alcohols to alkyl chlorides.

PBr3.name: phosphorus tribromide
PBr3.common_use: Converts primary and secondary alcohols to alkyl bromides with inversion.
